title: What it takes to be an Effective Manager - 2 Days (1)
subtitle: A practical leadership and management workshop for strengthening what it takes to be an effective manager - 2 days (1) capability at work.
whyThisMatters: What it takes to be an Effective Manager - 2 Days (1) helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to clearer leadership behavior, accountability, and team performance and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Module 5 - What Skills Do Managers Need?

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/What it takes to be an Effective Manager - 2 Days (1).md
